children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a fund to be known as the Indian Health Scholarship and Loan Repayment Recovery Fund (hereafter in this section referred to as the “Fund”). The Fund shall consist of such amounts as may be appropriated to the Fund under subsection (b). Amounts appropriated for the Fund shall remain available until expended.

children.label: A
children.text: the liability of individuals under subparagraph (A) or (B) of for the breach of contracts entered into under ; andsection 1613a(b)(5) of this titlesection 1613a of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the liability of individuals under section 1616a() of this title for the breach of contracts entered into under ; andlsection 1616a of this title

the aggregate amount of interest accruing during the preceding fiscal year on obligations held in the Fund pursuant to subsection (d) and the amount of proceeds from the sale or redemption of such obligations during such fiscal year.

children.label: A
children.text: to which a scholarship recipient under or a loan repayment program participant under has been assigned to meet the obligated service requirements pursuant to sections; andsection 1613a of this titlesection 1616a of this title1So in original. Probably should be “to such”.1

children.label: B
children.text: that has a need for a health professional to provide health care services as a result of such recipient or participant having breached the contract entered into under or .section 1613a of this titlesection 1616a of this title

An Indian tribe or tribal organization receiving payments pursuant to paragraph (1) may expend the payments to recruit and employ, directly or by contract, health professionals to provide health care services.

The Secretary of the Treasury shall invest such amounts of the Fund as such Secretary determines are not required to meet current withdrawals from the Fund. Such investments may be made only in interest-bearing obligations of the United States. For such purpose, such obligations may be acquired on original issue at the issue price, or by purchase of outstanding obligations at the market price.
Any obligation acquired by the Fund may be sold by the Secretary of the Treasury at the market price.
